description.ko: 빛이 순수한 에너지로 굴절되는 과정을 보여주며, 수정 유리를 통해 무지개가 찬란하게 분산되는 모습을 표현했습니다.
description.en: The refraction of light into pure energy, showcasing the brilliant dispersion of the rainbow through crystalline glass.

prompt: A high-precision optical render of PRISM-2, titled 'The Spectral Fracture.' A complex geometric glass prism on a dark matte surface refracts a beam of white light into a brilliant spectrum of #FF0080 magenta, #00FF80 mint, and #8000FF deep violet. Soft #FFFF00 yellow caustic patterns dance across the background. Macro focus on internal light reflections and intense chromatic aberration. 8k resolution, minimalist aesthetic, capturing pure energy containing the rainbow.
